title: senecio callosus
intro: Senecio callosus, also known as the woolly groundsel, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio callosus include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Senecio callosus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
